mapper.update:
/* 🚀 관리자 전용: 들어온(null이 아닌) 데이터만 쏙쏙 골라서 업데이트 (Null Overwrite 완벽 방어) */ UPDATE MEMBER
MBR_NAME = #{mbrName},
MBR_NICKNAME = #{mbrNickname},
MBR_TELNO = #{mbrTelno},
MBR_ZIP = #{mbrZip},
MBR_ADDR = #{mbrAddr},
MBR_DADDR = #{mbrDaddr},
MBR_AUTH_CD = #{mbrAuthCd},
MBR_USE_YN = #{mbrUseYn},
MBR_PASSWORD = #{mbrPassword}
WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY MBR_JOIN_DATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT M.*, F.FILE_ORG_NM, F.FILE_SAVE_NM, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_EXT, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_MIME_TYPE, F.FILE_TYPE FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN FILE F ON M.MBR_PROFILE_FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO AND F.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE M.MBR_ID = #{mbrId} AND M.MBR_USE_YN = 'Y';

SELECT M.*, F.FILE_ORG_NM, F.FILE_SAVE_NM, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_EXT, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_MIME_TYPE, F.FILE_TYPE FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN FILE F ON M.MBR_PROFILE_FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO AND F.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE M.MBR_EMAIL = #{email} AND M.MBR_USE_YN = 'Y';
